description_long: This lamppost features a tall, cylindrical black metal pole with ornate detailing along its shaft and base. At the top, three lantern-style lamp heads are arranged in a T-shaped configuration, each with a classic Victorian-inspired design, including domed tops and clear glass panels. Decorative scrollwork connects the lamp heads to the central pole, adding an elegant flourish. The base is robust and slightly flared, providing stability and a touch of ornamental character. The lamp heads are spaced evenly, with the central head positioned higher than the two flanking heads. The overall appearance is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban environments such as parks, boulevards, or historic districts.
description: A tall, black, Victorian-style lamppost with three ornate lantern heads and decorative scrollwork. The design is elegant and classic, ideal for urban or park settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the central lamp head and one flanking lamp head, with scrollwork visible on the left.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all three lamp heads in a symmetrical T-shaped arrangement, with ornate scrollwork beneath each head.
description_view_2: Side view mirroring view 0, with the opposite flanking lamp head and scrollwork visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of all three lamp heads and the decorative scrollwork connecting them.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian lantern style with domed tops, finials, and clear glass panels
